message:
feat(tui): add shimmer highlight effect to dashboard and timeline entries

Implement time-based shimmer/highlight on recently-added event log
and timeline entries. New constants control shimmer window duration,
max affected rows, and highlight width. Helper functions
(unix_epoch_micros_now, shimmer_progress_for_timestamp,
shimmer_window_indices, shimmerize_plain_text) compute highlight
intensity based on entry age within the shimmer window.

Both dashboard and timeline receive the effect gated behind
effects_enabled. Tests verify shimmer window expiration and max
row capping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
